failure.symptom: App stuck on 'Initializing the connection to the local database...' indefinitely. Frontend loads but absurd-sql (browser SQLite via IndexedDB+SharedArrayBuffer) worker never completes initialization. Additionally better-sqlite3 native module fails to compile on Node v25.8.1.
attempted: git clone (tree:0 filter) + sparse checkout to reach commit 80bb4ab299
yarn install (yarn 4.9.1 via corepack) - better-sqlite3 compilation failed but frontend deps OK
Started desktop-client directly with IS_GENERIC_BROWSER=1 PORT=3001 REACT_APP_BACKEND_WORKER_HASH=dev
Vite dev server running with COOP/COEP headers verified
Tested in normal and incognito Chrome windows - same result
Waited 5+ minutes on initialization screen - never resolves
failure.recommendation: Need Node 20 (via nvm) for better-sqlite3 compilation, or investigate absurd-sql worker initialization failure in browser. May also need to run actual-server alongside desktop-client.
